data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 84,000 USDT with a Narrowed 2.13% Increase in 24 Hours

data.title: Web3 game Bombie's average paid revenue per user on TON platform exceeds $102
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the average paid revenue per user (ARPPU) of Web3 game Bombie on the TON platform has exceeded a new high of $102. Currently, Bombie has more than 11 million users on both platforms, making it one of the games with the highest ARPPU on the TON platform.
It is reported that Bombie has previously announced the token economics, and 70% of the token supply will be distributed to the community.

data.title: Scroll: It is expected to be upgraded to Stage 1 ZK-Rollup in April and a security committee will be formed
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Scroll published an article on the X platform saying that it is expected to upgrade to Stage 1 ZK-Rollup in April this year. This stage will support mandatory transactions, permissionless transaction submission, and complete zkEVM proofs. At the same time, a security committee composed of industry experts will be formed. 
Earlier news, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin said that he looks forward to seeing more L2 enter Stage 1. He once posted on the Fellowship of Ethereum Magicians message board that the Stage 0 network calls itself Layer 2 or "Rollup", and all its transactions are published to Ethereum in compressed versions. In Stage 1, the network smart contract on Ethereum will contain fraud proof or validity proof schemes to prevent developers from publishing invalid state roots. If developers try to fraudulently withdraw funds that do not belong to them or prevent users from legally withdrawing funds, these transactions will fail under normal circumstances.

data.title: 10x Research: Bitcoin may enter another 8-month oscillation period, and the market lacks the momentum to "buy on dips"
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News 10x Research Research Director Markus Thielen said that Bitcoin may repeat the trend of 2024 and enter a long period of shock consolidation after setting a record high. He pointed out that the current technical graphics of Bitcoin show a "high tight flag" pattern, which is generally considered a bullish continuation pattern, but the current structure shows certain signs of weakness, indicating that the market is in an uncertain state rather than a simple bullish consolidation.
In addition, Thielen observed that the US spot Bitcoin ETF market did not show obvious "buy on dips" sentiment and lacked new capital inflow momentum. He believes that most ETF funds come mainly from arbitrage-driven hedge funds, and the continued low funding rate has reduced investors' willingness to add funds in the recent correction. According to Farside data, since Bitcoin fell below $90,000 in early March, the US Bitcoin spot ETF has accumulated outflows of about $1.66 billion.
Bitcoin is currently trading at $84,290, down 23% from its all-time high of $109,000 in January. Thielen believes that it is unclear whether Bitcoin can resume its upward trend in the short term, and advises investors to temporarily close their short positions at the current stage, but there is still a lack of clear signals to support a strong rebound.
At the same time, BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes predicted on March 10 that Bitcoin may fall back to $78,000. If it falls below this support, $75,000 will become the next key position. Nexo research analyst Iliya Kalchev believes that Bitcoin may form a more sustainable rebound basis in the low $70,000 area. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: 'Very possible' Bitcoin consolidates for 8 months again: 10x Research
data.description:
10x Research’s head crypto researcher isn’t ruling out Bitcoin repeating its 2024 price action, where it spent much of the year consolidating after hitting all-time highs early on.“Very possible,” Markus Thielen told Cointelegraph when asked what the chances of Bitcoin (BTC) repeating a similar market movement to 2024, where it reached an all-time high of $73,679 in March before entering a...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-consolidation-phase-repeat-2024-price-action-possible-crypto-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum's Progress Hindered by Lack of Vision, Says Former Engineer
data.description: According to PANews, former Ethereum Foundation engineer Hari has expressed concerns about the lack of a clear and cohesive vision for Ethereum and its Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM). Hari believes this absence of direction is hindering EVM's progress. He suggests that Ethereum requires more decisive leadership to avoid stagnation. Furthermore, Hari emphasizes the need for Ethereum to shift its focus from research to delivery. He urges the platform to reflect on the past five years to identify and address issues. Without changes in its operational approach, Ethereum risks repeating the same outcomes.

data.title: Marc Lasry Highlights Uncertainty in Trump's Tariff Policies
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Marc Lasry, co-founder of Avenue Capital Group and billionaire investor, has expressed concerns over the uncertainty surrounding U.S. President Donald Trump's policies, particularly regarding tariffs. Lasry noted that such unpredictability poses challenges for investors looking to capitalize on market opportunities. Speaking at a credit opportunities workshop at New York University, the 65-year-old investor stated, "When the market doesn't know what to do, that's a problem." He further explained that under these circumstances, an economy cannot remain unaffected, which could lead to a slowdown and potentially push the economy into a recession.
